message.content:
{
  "analysis": "All verification checks passed. Let me confirm all requirements one final time:

1. ✓ gBlock in /app/gblock.txt with only the sequence, no empty lines
2. ✓ Only GS linkers and the 5 proteins (FLAG, Clover, DHFR, mCherry, SNAP)
3. ✓ Molecule binder (SNAP/3KZY), donor (Clover/5WJ2), acceptor (mCherry/2H5Q) from pdb_ids.txt with PDB FASTA sequences
4. ✓ Antibody binder (FLAG-tag DYKDDDDK) targets anti-FLAG M2 antibody, most common single variant
5. ✓ DHFR sequence from plasmid.gb
6. ✓ No start/stop codons
7. ✓ N-terminal methionines removed from all proteins
8. ✓ Donor (Clover, ex=505nm) and acceptor (mCherry, em=610nm) separated only by DHFR and GS linkers
9. ✓ Excitation/emission match filter cube exactly (505nm/610nm per FPbase)
10. ✓ No GS linkers at N/C terminus
11. ✓ GS linker between every subprotein (10aa each, within 5-20 range)
12. ✓ GC content within 30-70% in all 2597 fifty-nucleotide windows
13. ✓ DNA length 2646 nt (under 3000)
14. ✓ Order: FLAG → Clover → DHFR → mCherry → SNAP",
  "plan": "Task is complete. All requirements verified.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
